description_for_human: Render a comprehensive morning briefing combining schedule, email digest, Teams highlights, and meeting prep context.
description_for_model: Call this action when the user asks to 'prep my day', 'morning brief', or 'what do I need to know today'. Pass today's calendar events, email digest, Teams highlights, meeting prep context, tasks, and action items. The server filters meetings, computes free blocks, and formats everything into a mobile-optimized morning brief.

functions.name: renderMorningBrief
functions.description: Render a comprehensive morning briefing with schedule, email digest, Teams highlights, and per-meeting prep context.
